subject: [NBI] Add missing DB service entry for local DB deployment
commit_message:
[NBI] Add missing DB service entry for local DB deployment

Without this entry deployment with local DB fails

Issue-ID: OOM-2762

Change-Id: I9c405996f62549b9dc8c191b1fed47e3f7b44b88
Signed-off-by: andreasgeissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>

Patch Set 2: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2757/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2757/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2757/ )
